understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to reach the goal gem tile marked '+' in each level, navigating through grid-based levels while avoiding hazards like spikes and managing limited turns per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is primarily horizontal (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity automatically pulls the character down until it lands on a solid tile, hits a spike, or reaches the goal. CLICK interacts with clickable tiles like breakable blocks ('x') to remove them and open paths. UNDO reverts the last action. Spike tiles ('u'/'v') cause immediate failure on landing. Only horizontal moves advance the turn count and any moving platform timer; clicks do not.
